description: MCP server that provides LLMs with tools for interacting with EVM networks

findings.title: INSUFFICIENT_TOOL_DATA
findings.description: Tool 'Unknown' has no description - agents cannot reason about its purpose, and static analysis coverage is limited
findings.recommendation: Review and remediate the identified issue.
